x-enumeration-literals.name: Cashback Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Points converted into cash credited to an account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Voucher Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Points exchanged for gift vouchers or coupons.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product / Merchandise Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Points used to purchase physical goods.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Benefit Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Points used to waive fees or obtain services.

Comment:
Example: Annual fee waiver.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partner Transfer Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Points transferred to an external loyalty program.

Comment:
Example: Airline miles transfer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Statement Credit Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Points applied to reduce card outstanding balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Travel Redemption Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Points used for flights or hotel bookings.
